title: Super Changed Panoramas
description: Panorama resource packs for Super Changed modpack.
body:
**Modrinth for _some_ reason decided to reject the Super Changed modpack because of this resourcepack, so I am no longer updating this on modrinth. If you want the latest version of this- go to CurseForge, and if you want the Super Changed modpack- it's only on CurseForge. Thanks Modrinth team!**

[Super Changed modpack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/superchanged) and [Super Changed Resources](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/super-changed-resources)

Big thanks to [Pack Basics](https://jeqo.net/guide/pack-basics/) and [Panorama mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/panorama)!

My first "resource pack" if you can even call it that. These resource packs add custom panoramas for Super Changed. This resource pack isn't meant for regular users, mainly for my modpack, Super Changed.

I might add more stuff to this if I ever figure out how to properly make resource packs, but I am just sticking to panoramas and splash texts for now.

[[DISCORD]](https://discord.com/invite/XZrVJnerzT)
